name: United Soccer Coaches National Convention
staffTierReason: Largest coaching gathering in the country — the All-American & Senior Bowl combine here is what recruits target.
notes: The convention itself is for coaches, but the All-America Game and the senior recruit combine attract every level of college coach. Best for late-cycle uncommitted seniors.

name: Jefferson Cup Showcase
staffTierReason: One of the two highest-attended college showcases on the East Coast — ACC, Big East, SEC coaches all attend.
notes: Top East-Coast spring showcase. Boys and girls weekends are separate. Apply through your club's competitive team — individual athletes cannot enter.

name: Disney Soccer Showcase
location: ESPN Wide World of Sports Complex, Orlando, FL
staffTierReason: Premier holiday showcase — heaviest D1 representation of any winter event.
notes: Massive scale. Bring printed player profiles and check the coach list before each game. Team event only — apply through your club.

name: ECNL Girls National Event (Summer Showcase)
location: Surf Cup Sports Park, Del Mar, CA
staffTierReason: The single highest-attended women's college recruiting event. D1 coaches prioritize ECNL above every other event.
notes: Your club has to qualify. If you're at an ECNL club, this is the most important weekend of your recruiting year.

name: ECNL Boys National Event (Summer Showcase)
staffTierReason: Top D1 men's coaches stage their summer recruiting calendar around this event.
notes: ECNL Boys has rapidly become the most-watched men's club platform, alongside MLS NEXT. Apply through club.

name: MLS NEXT Flex Summer Showcase
staffTierReason: Premier men's pathway showcase — D1 coaches actively recruit from MLS NEXT clubs.
notes: Open to MLS NEXT-rostered players only. Coaches focus on the older age groups (U17, U19).

name: Nike College ID Camp
location: Multiple host campuses (Chicago, Boston, LA, Atlanta)
staffTierReason: Solid for athletes without ECNL/MLS NEXT access — but most D1 staffs send assistants, not head coaches.
notes: Open individual registration. Pick the regional session closest to the conferences you want exposure to.

name: adidas Soccer Regional College ID Camp
staffTierReason: Strong Texas / Big 12 presence. Less national reach than Nike or IMG.
notes: Best fit if you're targeting Big 12 and Sun Belt programs. Coaches list published 2 weeks before.

name: IMG Academy College ID Showcase (Women)
staffTierReason: Top D1-only individual showcase — SEC, ACC, Big East coaches attend.
notes: Selective — submit highlight video with application. Best for athletes already on D1 radar who need additional reps in front of coaches.

name: IMG Academy College ID Showcase (Men)
staffTierReason: D1-only invite-style camp — ACC and SEC coaches attend most years.
notes: Highly competitive selection. Pair with an MLS NEXT showcase the same week if possible.

name: Surf College Cup Summer Showcase
location: Surf Cup Sports Park, San Diego, CA
staffTierReason: Largest West Coast college showcase — Pac-12, WCC, Big Sky coaches all attend.
notes: Boys and girls run concurrent weekends. Heat is brutal — bring extra hydration. Team-based; no individual entry.

name: Las Vegas College Showcase
location: Bettye Wilson Soccer Complex, Las Vegas, NV
staffTierReason: Best fall West-Coast showcase. Strong D1/D2/D3 mix and easy to schedule late-cycle visits before NLI.
notes: Great for uncommitted juniors/seniors looking for late offers. Verify coach list one week prior.

name: Florida Premier Invitational
location: Lake Myrtle Sports Park, Auburndale, FL
staffTierReason: Heavy SEC, ACC, Sun Belt, and SSC attendance. Top Thanksgiving-week showcase.
notes: Replaces older USYS Florida showcase as the strongest late-November Florida event.

name: CASL Showcase Series (Carolina Invitational)
organizer: Capital Area Soccer League / NCFC Youth
staffTierReason: ACC heartland — UNC, Duke, NC State, Wake all attend, plus Big South and SAC.
notes: Excellent for Southeast-targeting athletes. Schedule a campus visit at UNC/Duke/NC State the same trip.

name: Crossfire Premier Challenge
staffTierReason: Best Pacific Northwest exposure event. WCC and Big Sky coaches attend in force.
notes: If you're in the Pacific NW, this is your nearest national-tier event. Smaller than Surf Cup.

name: Midwest College ID Camp
staffTierReason: Useful for D2/D3/NAIA athletes in the Midwest — but D1 representation is thin.
notes: Solid for athletes targeting MIAA, GLIAC, or Crossroads League. Skip if you're targeting D1.

name: NESCAC Coaches Association Combine
staffTierReason: All 11 NESCAC head coaches in one place — non-negotiable if you want NESCAC.
notes: Combined NESCAC ID — one fee, all 11 head coaches present. Top D3 academic destination.

name: Phoenix College Showcase
staffTierReason: Strong Sun Belt, WAC, and California State System coaches attend.
notes: Best Southwest exposure outside of Texas. Good late-cycle event for uncommitted juniors.

name: NAIA National Soccer Combine
location: Swope Soccer Village, Kansas City, MO
staffTierReason: Premier NAIA-specific event — every major NAIA program sends coaches.
notes: If NAIA is your target division, this is the highest-leverage weekend of the year. Strong scholarship offers come out of this event.

name: Colorado Rush College ID Camp
location: Dick's Sporting Goods Park, Commerce City, CO
staffTierReason: Solid RMAC and Mountain West D2 attendance — lighter on D1.
notes: Best Mountain region event for D2/D3/NAIA exposure. Altitude is no joke — arrive a day early.

name: NJCAA National ID Showcase
coachAttendance: 40+ JUCO coaches across NJCAA D1 and D2
staffTierReason: The premier JUCO showcase — especially if you're aiming for KJCCC powerhouses.
notes: Direct exposure to KJCCC, Region 6, and Region 13 programs. Great pathway if you need a JUCO bridge year before D1.

name: TopDrawerSoccer All-American ID Camp
staffTierReason: Invite-only — Big Ten, ACC, and Big East coaches attend. Strong late-summer option.
notes: You need to be on TopDrawer's radar via club or rankings. Submit highlight video with application.
